scraper_registry.name: California State Grants (grants.ca.gov)
scraper_registry.notes: California state grants — Hanna's #1 grant source. Native API client using grants.ca.gov public API.

scraper_registry.name: Federal Grants (Grants.gov)
scraper_registry.notes: Federal grants — SAMHSA, HHS, ED, OVW. Uses Grants.gov REST API with keyword and eligibility filters.

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Community Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: Local community foundation with grants for Sonoma County nonprofits. Playwright scraper on grants/RFP page.

scraper_registry.name: California Wellness Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: Major CA health funder. Focus areas align with Hanna's mental health and youth services.

scraper_registry.name: Blue Shield of California Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: CA health foundation funding mental health, domestic violence prevention, and health equity.

scraper_registry.name: Walter S. Johnson Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: Northern CA foundation focused on youth development and education equity. Invitation-based but posts RFPs.

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Health Services
scraper_registry.notes: County health department grants and RFPs. Hanna has deep county relationship (Probation, ARPA, SPTP).

scraper_registry.name: Grantmakers.io (IRS 990-PF Foundation Discovery)
scraper_registry.notes: IRS 990-PF data for discovering CA foundations funding youth services. API with state/keyword filters.

scraper_registry.name: SAMHSA Grant Announcements
scraper_registry.notes: Federal mental health and substance use grants. Key funder for behavioral health programs like CSC.

scraper_registry.name: California DHCS Funding Opportunities
scraper_registry.notes: State Medi-Cal and behavioral health funding. DHCS funds Hanna's CSC Early Psychosis Program via CYBHI.

scraper_registry.name: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer (990 API)
scraper_registry.notes: IRS 990 data for researching funder giving history and identifying prospects. Free API.

scraper_registry.name: USASpending.gov (Federal Award History)
scraper_registry.notes: Federal award history for competitive intelligence — who funds Sonoma County youth/mental health orgs.

scraper_registry.name: Board of State and Community Corrections (BSCC)
scraper_registry.notes: OJJDP Title II and juvenile justice grants. Hanna has existing Probation relationship for referrals.

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Probation Department
scraper_registry.notes: County probation RFPs and contracts. Hanna has active probation referral relationship (HEAL/Camino Nuevo).

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Office of Education
scraper_registry.notes: County education office grants for professional development and trauma-informed training programs.

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Community Services and Support
scraper_registry.notes: County community services RFPs for recreation, enrichment, and youth development programs.

scraper_registry.name: Sonoma County Behavioral Health Division
scraper_registry.notes: County behavioral health contracts and subgrants. Key funder for Hanna's community mental health services.

scraper_registry.name: Carrie Estelle Doheny Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: CA 501(c)(3), youth welfare, counseling, social welfare, camperships. Awards $1K-$350K. Multiple cycles/year. Discovered via 990-PF analysis — funds 2+ Hanna peer orgs.

scraper_registry.name: Sobrato Philanthropies
scraper_registry.notes: Page-change monitor. Invitation-only, email inquiry (grants@sobrato.org). Silicon Valley focus, Essential Human Services $50K-multi-million. Funds 5 Hanna peer orgs. Top-ranked 990-PF discovery.

scraper_registry.name: Weingart Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: Page-change monitor. Invitation-only, SoCal 5-county. Awards $25K-$400K unrestricted. Housing justice, nonprofit effectiveness. Public grants database at weingartfnd.org/grant-p-r-i-database/.

scraper_registry.name: Heffernan Foundation
scraper_registry.notes: Page-change monitor. Walnut Creek, invite-only annual cycle (Sept 15 deadline). Education, food insecurity, homelessness. Awards $2.5K-$10K. Funds 3 Hanna peer orgs including Buckelew and North Bay Children's Center.

notes: Phase 2 implements scrapers (17 original + 4 discovered foundations = 21 sources). APIs (grants-ca-gov, grants-gov, grantmakers-io) use native API clients. Scrapers use Playwright on Lambda. Phase 2.1 added Doheny Foundation scraper + 3 page-change monitors from 990-PF funder analysis.
